title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates:
IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates!
